hero_desc: Soul of Waifu is a desktop app for creating and interacting with AI characters. Create characters, run role-play sessions, use local or cloud models. No complexity — just immersion.
dim_sub: Your companion is no longer locked in a text chat — they live wherever you are.
pipeline_sub: Your companion seamlessly morphs across three states depending on your needs.
dim_chat_desc: Text and voice chat with no artificial filters or restrictions. You have complete control over your roleplay experience — from interactive lorebooks to a flexible system of custom state variables. Create any scenario, assign a voice and visual avatar to your hero, and start your journey all within a single app.
dim_chat_li_0: Total creative freedom: interactive lorebooks, flexible editors, state variables, and avatars
dim_chat_li_1: Natural dialogue: built-in voice engines with real-time speech streaming
dim_chat_li_2: Complete flexibility: run models 100% locally or connect to powerful cloud APIs
dim_memory_desc: Each character has an independent digital brain that goes far beyond basic fact-searching. They remember your jokes, analyze your actions, grow closer to you over time, and keep a personal diary with raw reflections on your chats. Meanwhile, a silent background agent quietly works to ensure their memories remain consistent and free of contradictions.
dim_memory_li_0: Personal diary: intimate first-person journal entries about you and your conversations
dim_memory_li_1: Relationship profile: the companion's behavior naturally adapts based on your shared history
dim_memory_li_2: Memory self-healing: a background agent seamlessly resolves any logical contradictions in the chat
dim_memory_li_3: Cognitive profiles: easily customize memory depth to perfectly fit your PC's hardware
dim_stage_desc: Transform regular dialogue into an interactive story adventure. Journey with a party of heroes under a virtual Game Master tracking locations, inventory, character status, and random plot events.
dim_stage_li_0: AI Game Master with interactive plot choices
dim_stage_li_1: State registry: inventory, stats, and canonical world state
dim_stage_li_2: Dynamic companion NPCs, custom ambient sounds, and scenery
dim_companion_desc: Your character steps out of the chat and onto your desktop as a Live2D or VRM avatar. Powered by neurohormones, they experience tiredness, get bored, share thoughts, and proactively start conversations, commenting on your activity and helping you with daily PC tasks.
dim_companion_li_0: Environmental awareness: visual screen recognition and smart clipboard reading
dim_companion_li_1: Proactive AI: thoughtful commentary on your activity and independent thoughts
dim_companion_li_2: Tool Calling support: use the built-in tools or connect to an MCP server
dim_unify_text: Set up your character once — and they'll follow you the whole way, from a simple line of text to your desktop.
feat_sub: Powerful engine under the hood, intuitive UI on the surface
feat_0_desc: The interface is designed to remove distractions, keeping the spotlight entirely on your companion. With a streamlined sidebar, organized tabs, and polished animations, navigating the platform is natural and effortless right from the start.
feat_0_li_0: Clean, minimalist, and ergonomic visual style
feat_0_li_1: Intelligent sidebar and clean tab-based layout
feat_0_li_2: Interactive chat with smooth, flowing text animations
feat_0_li_3: Elegant, non-intrusive notification toasts that never interrupt focus
feat_1_desc: Run open-source models completely offline or connect to leading cloud APIs. With the built-in server, setting up local GGUF models is seamless — simply download your preferred model directly from the interface.
feat_1_li_0: Top-tier cloud models: Claude, DeepSeek, GPT-5, Gemini, Grok, Qwen and more
feat_1_li_1: Built-in Llama CPP Server with full hardware acceleration
feat_1_li_2: Visual download manager for local models with instant cancellation
feat_1_li_3: Native acceleration for CUDA, Vulkan, Intel SYCL, and AMD HIP
feat_2_desc: A complete space for deep conversation: manage chat histories, organize your library into folders, make live audio calls, and set custom backgrounds. You can even ask LLM to generate an image for you or send empty messages to prompt your companion to continue their train of thought.
feat_2_li_0: Organize your character library easily using custom folders
feat_2_li_1: Seamless history import/export and contextual author notes
feat_2_li_2: Local web client to chat from your smartphone within your home network
feat_2_li_3: Custom chat backdrops and a dedicated text-generation stop button
feat_3_desc: Characters speak naturally using advanced speech engines with life-like inflections. Voice playback starts instantly, sentence-by-sentence, eliminating awkward wait times. The platform supports dynamic Live2D (with motion animations), 3D VRM avatars, custom images, and GIFs.
feat_3_li_0: Instant, sentence-by-sentence voice streaming with zero delays
feat_3_li_1: Multiple text-to-speech options, voice cloning, and RVC parameters
feat_3_li_2: Interactive Live2D and VRM avatars with motion support and LipSync
feat_3_li_3: Real-time text analysis recognizing 28 distinct emotional states
feat_4_desc: Fine-tune story arcs and character depth using layered lorebooks, custom state variables, and the interactive Soul Stage mode. The virtual Game Master takes care of all the world-building, tracking, and campaign progression for your adventure.
feat_4_li_0: Link multiple lorebooks simultaneously with semantic story triggers
feat_4_li_1: Soul Stage RPG system with a unified World State and inventory
feat_4_li_2: Custom state variables visualized via an adaptive horizontal HUD
feat_4_li_3: Industry-standard V2 Spec compatibility (PNG/JSON card import)
feat_5_desc: A complete control center for your AI engine. Fine-tune advanced text samplers, local model quantization parameters, MoE layers, context window sizing, and enable Thinking Mode for reasoning LLMs.
feat_5_li_0: Advanced samplers: Min-P, XTC, DRY, and dynamic temperature
feat_5_li_1: Low-level LLM tuning: and custom launch settings
feat_5_li_2: A wide variety of Soul of Waifu feature expansion modules
feat_5_li_3: Total appearance customization: unique themes and message bubbles
sc_sub: Click on a screenshot to enlarge
sc_1_desc: Interactive cards with folder grouping and quick search
sc_2_desc: Smooth text output, typing indicators, and clean bubble design
sc_3_desc: Deep personality, scenario, and multiple provider settings
sc_4_desc: Event triggers, scene tension, and chain dependencies
sc_5_desc: Local model downloader and server with hardware recommendations
sc_6_desc: Full-duplex speech dialogue with seamless interruption support
sc_7_desc: Cognitive memory layers and character's personal diary
sc_8_desc: Interactive RPG sessions managed by the virtual Game Master
sc_9_desc: Desktop companion widget with neurohormone states & MCP tools
hist_sub: From a console tool to a multi-dimensional character platform
hist_0_desc: The beginning — a simple console utility for AI interaction with basic text input and logic. The first commit that would grow into Soul of Waifu.
hist_1_desc: Move to GUI. Worked only with Character AI — but it was a big step forward.
hist_2_desc: A full platform rewrite (v2.0): new GUI, local GGUF models, Mistral AI integration, and XTTS voice synthesis. A month later, v2.1 added OpenAI and OpenRouter support plus Edge TTS with RVC voice cloning.
hist_3_desc: A complete interface redesign — the “Soul Renaissance” release. Added VRM avatar support, GPU acceleration (CUDA/Vulkan), the Models Hub, lorebooks, Smart Memory, and ambient sounds.
hist_4_desc: The “Soul Resonance” release: real-time voice with interruption and LipSync, the launch of Desktop Companion mode, a new RPG lorebook engine, the signature Liquid Glass interface, local-model improvements, and automatic chat summarization.
hist_5_desc: A release that unifies the character's persona under a single digital mind—Soul Memory—granting access to three distinct dimensions at once: classic communication via chat, Soul Stage with a virtual Game Master, and Soul Companion on your desktop, complete with tool calling and custom plugin support.
hist_future_title: The next chapter is yours to write
hist_future_desc: Soul of Waifu is driven entirely by its community. What comes next depends on your ideas, feedback, and active involvement. Join our official Discord server to discuss development, suggest new features, and directly influence the evolution of the project.
dl_desc: Download Soul of Waifu and start creating your companions right now. Free and fully open source.
footer_desc: Desktop companion platform and virtual operating system for AI characters. Create, configure, and connect.
footer_copy: © 2026 Soul of Waifu. Created by Jofi.
